controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all-india financial institutions namely export-import bank of india ('exim bank'), national bank for agriculture and rural developmen
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to All-India Financial Institutions namely
Export-Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural
Development ('NABARD'), Small Industries Development Bank of India ('SIDBI'),
National Housing Bank ('NHB') and National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and
Development ('NaBFID'), hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and
individually as an 'AIFI', to the extant the directions contained herein are not
inconsistent with the statutory provisions or instructions issued thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all-india financial institutions namely export-import bank of india ('exim bank'), national bank for agriculture and rural developmen

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'director' means a director appointed on the board of an aifi
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of an AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'director' means a director appointed on the board of an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m
controls.control_description:
All expressions shall have the same meaning as have been assigned to them
under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949,
or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms
published by the RBI, or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board-approved policy relating to courses / certifications required for specialised areas of operations as laid out in paragraph 15 and paragra
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall have a Board-approved policy relating to courses / certifications
required for specialised areas of operations as laid out in paragraph 15 and
paragraph 16 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board-approved policy relating to courses / certifications required for specialised areas of operations as laid out in paragraph 15 and paragra

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend facility of deferment of option premium only after conducting due diligence of users in accordance with its board approved policy in this regar
controls.control_description:
The Board of an AIFI shall extend facility of deferment of option premium only
after conducting due diligence of users in accordance with its Board approved
policy in this regard, as set out in paragraph 11 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to extend facility of deferment of option premium only after conducting due diligence of users in accordance with its board approved policy in this regar

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up an apex audit committee of the board (acb) consisting of about five directors
controls.control_description:
An AIFI may set up an apex Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) consisting of
about five Directors;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up an apex audit committee of the board (acb) consisting of about five directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be chartered accountants or have experience in management, finance, accountancy and audit systems etc
controls.control_description:
one or more of such Directors may be Chartered
Accountants or have experience in management, finance, accountancy and
audit systems etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be chartered accountants or have experience in management, finance, accountancy and audit systems etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure directors representing staff
controls.control_description: Provided that directors representing staff, if any, may not be included in the ACB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to directors representing staff

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet, at least, once a quarter but not less than six times a year
controls.control_description: The ACB may meet, at least, once a quarter but not less than six times a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet, at least, once a quarter but not less than six times a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter alia, the following: (1) providing direction as also overseeing the operation of the total audit functions of the aifi
controls.control_description:
The functions of ACB may include, inter alia, the following:
(1) providing direction as also overseeing the operation of the total audit
functions of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter alia, the following: (1) providing direction as also overseeing the operation of the total audit functions of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also focus on the follow-up on frauds and major areas of house-keeping
controls.control_description:
It may also
focus on the follow-up on frauds and major areas of house-keeping;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also focus on the follow-up on frauds and major areas of house-keeping

controls.control_objective: To ensure interact with the external auditors before the finalisation of the annual/semi-annual financial accounts and reports
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to interact with the external auditors before the finalisation of the annual/semi-annual financial accounts and reports

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out necessary due diligence with regard to the ability of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance with its board approved
controls.control_description:
An AIFI may, at its discretion, defer the premium on plain vanilla options and
forex option structures sold by it to users subject to the following conditions:
(1) the AIFI shall carry out necessary due diligence with regard to the ability
of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance
with its Board approved policy in this regard, before extending this
facility to the users;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out necessary due diligence with regard to the ability of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance with its board approved

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deferred
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deferred

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received uniformly over the maturity of the contract and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter
controls.control_description:
and
(3) premium shall be received uniformly over the maturity of the contract
and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received uniformly over the maturity of the contract and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available only if the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable to the aifi under any scenario
controls.control_description:
Provided that, in case of forex option structures, the above facility shall be
available only if the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable
to the AIFI under any scenario.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only if the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable to the aifi under any scenario

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to an intermediary aifi which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate clients on a completely covered basis
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, the above facility shall not be available to an intermediary
AIFI which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate
clients on a completely covered basis since intermediary AIFI itself is not a
'user'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to an intermediary aifi which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate clients on a completely covered basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, options and option structures shall continue to be
governed by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in Master
Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC Derivatives)
Directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc

controls.control_objective: To ensure report its secondary market transactions in corporate bonds done in otc market on fimmda's reporting platform
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall report its secondary market transactions in corporate bonds done
in OTC market on FIMMDA's reporting platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report its secondary market transactions in corporate bonds done in otc market on fimmda's reporting platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer detailed operational guidelines in this regard issued by fimmda
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The bank may refer detailed operational guidelines in this regard
issued by FIMMDA.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer detailed operational guidelines in this regard issued by fimmda

controls.control_objective: To ensure register itself and obtain a global intermediary identification number (giin)
controls.control_description:
An AIFI, if not already registered with US authorities as per the Government of
India's Inter-Governmental Agreement (IGA) with US to implement Foreign
Accounts Tax Compliance Act (FATCA), shall register itself and obtain a Global
Intermediary Identification Number (GIIN).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to register itself and obtain a global intermediary identification number (giin)

controls.control_objective: To ensure register itself and obtain a giin
controls.control_description:
Further, an AIFI having overseas branches in jurisdictions covered under
different FATCA frameworks is required to take appropriate registration actions
as under:
(1) An AIFI having overseas branches in Model 1 jurisdictions, including those
jurisdictions where an agreement under Model 1 has been reached in
substance, and is yet to register with US authorities, shall register itself
and obtain a GIIN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to register itself and obtain a giin

controls.control_objective: To ensure register with us authorities and obtain a giin
controls.control_description:
(2) An AIFI having overseas branches in a jurisdiction having IGA 2
agreement or in a jurisdiction that does not have an IGA but permits
financial institutions to register and agree to an FFI agreement, may
register with US authorities and obtain a GIIN, if not already registered, to
avoid potential withholding under FATCA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to register with us authorities and obtain a giin

controls.control_objective: To ensure register and their overseas branches would eventually be subject to withholding under fatca
controls.control_description:
(3) An AIFI having overseas branches in a jurisdiction that does not have an
IGA and does not permit financial institutions to register and agree to an
FFI agreement may not register and their overseas branches would
eventually be subject to withholding under FATCA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to register and their overseas branches would eventually be subject to withholding under fatca

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify specialised areas for certification of the staff manning key responsibilities
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall identify specialised areas for certification of the staff manning key
responsibilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify specialised areas for certification of the staff manning key responsibilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain the flexibility to require certification for any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for staff before their
controls.control_description:
While an AIFI shall retain the flexibility to require certification for
any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for
staff before their posting in the following areas, as applicable:
(1) treasury operations - dealers, mid-office operations;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain the flexibility to require certification for any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for staff before their

controls.control_objective: To ensure if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate, diploma and certificate courses offered by reputed universities, the same may also be considere
controls.control_description:
Provided that if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate, diploma
and certificate courses offered by reputed universities, the same may also be
considered as an accreditation/ certification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate, diploma and certificate courses offered by reputed universities, the same may also be considere

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify the courses / certifications, from those recognised by iba as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above, th
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall identify the courses / certifications, from those recognised by IBA
as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above,
those that are suitable for its operations and put in place a Board-approved
policy, mandating obtainment of such certifications by its employees working in
the respective areas.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify the courses / certifications, from those recognised by iba as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above, th

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place 'staff rotation' policy
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall put in place 'staff rotation' policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place 'staff rotation' policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure require its internal auditors and concurrent auditors to examine the implementation of policy for 'staff rotation' and point out instances of breaches irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall require its internal auditors and concurrent auditors to examine the
implementation of policy for 'staff rotation' and point out instances of breaches
irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to require its internal auditors and concurrent auditors to examine the implementation of policy for 'staff rotation' and point out instances of breaches irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subjected to comprehensive examination by the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be documented
controls.control_description:
Provided that the decisions taken / transactions effected by officers and staff not
rotated as per policy shall also be subjected to comprehensive examination by
the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be
documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subjected to comprehensive examination by the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
